videos.headline: Army trounces UConn at Fenway
videos.description: Army ends the season at 7-6 as they dominate UConn in the Wasabi Fenway Bowl.

videos.headline: Army coach Jeff Monken tries to sprint away from Gatorade bath
videos.description: Army head coach Jeff Monken tries to run away from his team but is chased down and splashed with Gatorade after winning the Wasabi Fenway Bowl.
